name: Steak & Ale Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red wine, or purple grape
recipeInstructions:
- For Chicken or Pork:
- 1/2 cup Soy sauce
- 1/2 cup Pineapple juice
- 1/4 cup White wine -- or white grape
- Mix ingredients for each marinade and marinate steaks or chicken up to 24 hours in the fridge. Add a dash of Worcestershire sauce to steak marinade.
